name: TreeItemDragIndicator
description:
A drag handle indicator for draggable tree items.
Only renders when drag-and-drop is enabled and the item is draggable.
Renders a `<span>` element.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

style.detailedType:
| React.CSSProperties
| ((
    state: Tree.ItemDragIndicator.State,
  ) => CSSProperties | undefined)
| undefined

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Tree.ItemDragIndicator.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-dragging.description: Present when the item is currently being dragged.

data-draggable.description: Present when the item is draggable.
